small.name: Gemini 1.5 Flash-Lite (Small/Fast)
small.description: Ultra-low cost and latency. Best for summarization, simple extractions, and basic QA.

mid.name: Gemini 1.5 Flash (Balanced)
mid.description: High speed, large context window. Best for standard conversation, classification, and multi-document search.

frontier.name: Gemini 1.5 Pro (Frontier Reasoner)
frontier.description: State-of-the-art logical reasoning, software engineering, and complex math.

templates.name: Document Summarization Template
templates.content:
# TASK
Summarize the following document into a concise executive summary. Highlight core objectives and key takeaways.

# CONSTRAINTS
- Limit summary to 3 bullet points.
- Be objective, direct, and professional.

# CONTENT
{{content}}

templates.name: Structured Code Review
templates.content:
# SYSTEM
You are an expert senior software architect conducting a code review.

# INSTRUCTIONS
Analyze the code provided below for potential bugs, memory leaks, performance bottlenecks, and design improvements.

# TARGET CODE
Language: {{language}}

```{{language}}
{{code}}
```

# OUTPUT FORMAT
Provide feedback in these sections:
- ## Critical Issues
- ## Performance Details
- ## Stylistic Recommendations
